overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a rural dirt path at night. The character travels past stone walls and through meadows before crossing a stone bridge, with a distant snow-capped mountain visible under a dark teal sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, passing by a stone wall

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
worn dirt trail winding through the countryside
open grassy fields with scattered wildflowers
dark silhouettes of mountains on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path at night, bordered by a stone wall on the left and open meadows on the right. The sky is dark teal with heavy clouds, and distant mountains are visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path approaching hillside settlement

events.description: stone wall on left ends, path opens into wider meadow
hillside settlement with lit windows becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the path through the open meadow, approaching a distant settlement on the hillside

entered.detail: cluster of buildings with warm lit windows on the left hillside
distant mountain peak with snow visible under the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide meadow as the stone wall ends. A hillside settlement with glowing windows appears on the left, and a distant snow-capped mountain becomes visible ahead. Geralt continues walking along the trail.

events.description: path transitions onto stone bridge with wooden plank flooring
character stops walking and turns around to face the camera

agents.ego_description: Geralt crosses the stone bridge, stops at the far end, and turns to face the camera

entered.detail: old stone bridge with wooden plank flooring and stone railings
stone wall railings on both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks onto an old stone bridge with wooden planks, crossing over a dark ravine. The snow-capped mountain is prominently visible in the background. He stops at the far end of the bridge and turns to face the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural night path that gradually opens into a wide landscape featuring a distant mountain peak. It begins with Geralt walking beside a stone wall under a heavy, dark teal sky, with open meadows stretching to the right. As the wall ends, the path expands into a broad meadow, revealing a hillside settlement with glowing windows to the left while a snow-capped mountain emerges more clearly on the horizon. The scene then shifts as Geralt crosses an old stone bridge with wooden planks over a dark ravine, keeping the prominent mountain centered in the background. Finally, he reaches the far end of the bridge and comes to a halt, turning to face the camera.
